feedItems.description: allocated £60.6m to Children's Social Care (≈£189 per resident)
allocated £27.9m to Other Services (≈£87 per resident)
allocated £87.3m to Adult Social Care (≈£272 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £100 (4.8%) to £2190
